raw_responses.GENERAL_DECISION_MAKING_1: Throughout the interview, Ryan shows a tendency to be thoughtful and considerate, often weighing pros and cons before making a decision. He also carefully considered his living situation, choosing to rent instead of buying a home. Therefore, it's likely that he makes decisions in a logical and systematic way.
raw_responses.GENERAL_DECISION_MAKING_2: Throughout the interview, the participant has shown a tendency to reflect on their decisions and take their time, even when faced with uncertainty. However, they have not explicitly stated that they wait until the pressure is on to make important decisions. raw_responses.GENERAL_DECISION_MAKING_3: Ryan mentioned multiple times throughout the interview that he values the input of others, especially his sister and friends, when making important decisions. raw_responses.GENERAL_DECISION_MAKING_4: Throughout the interview, Ryan mentions trusting his instincts when deciding to go back to school and choosing to work at the library. raw_responses.GENERAL_DECISION_MAKING_5: Throughout the interview, Ryan often mentions taking time to reflect on his decisions, weighing pros and cons, and considering multiple perspectives. raw_responses.GENERAL_DECISION_MAKING_6: Throughout the interview, Ryan Otoole demonstrates a thoughtful and deliberate approach to decision-making. He also carefully considered his major, choosing to explore different subjects before committing to a field of study. Given his approach to major life decisions, it's likely that he also explores all of his options before making smaller, everyday decisions.
